name: U-238
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large punch bowl.
2. Stir well to ensure even distribution of flavors.
3. Refrigerate until chilled, about 2 hours or overnight.
4. Serve the mixture over ice in glasses as desired.
This beverage's motto is: Hiroshima's favorite since '45. Guaranteed to
bomb you into the next decade!
